name: Neuropathways Psychological Services
heroSubtitle: Evidence-Based Therapy and Psychological & Neuropsychological Assessment

about.headline: About Us
about.text: Neuropathways Psychological Services is a clinical psychology practice dedicated to understanding the complex connections between brain functioning, emotional wellbeing, and everyday life. Our practice provides evidence-based therapy and comprehensive psychological and neuropsychological evaluations for adolescents and adults seeking greater clarity, support, and personal growth.
about.text2: We believe that effective psychological care begins with listening carefully to each person’s story. Our approach is collaborative, compassionate, and grounded in science, with a focus on helping individuals better understand their experiences, strengthen resilience, and develop practical strategies for navigating life’s challenges.

serviceList.title: Therapy
serviceList.description: Therapy offers a supportive and collaborative space to explore challenges, gain insight, and develop practical strategies for change. We work with individuals experiencing concerns such as anxiety, depression, stress, trauma, identity development, and life transitions. Our approach integrates evidence-based treatments, including cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), acceptance and commitment therapy (ACT), and mindfulness-informed strategies, with an emphasis on empathy, collaboration, and individualized care.

serviceList.title: Psychological Evaluations
serviceList.description: Psychological evaluations provide a comprehensive understanding of emotional, behavioral, and psychological functioning. Through clinical interviews, standardized testing, and review of relevant history, these evaluations help clarify diagnoses, identify strengths and areas of difficulty, and guide treatment or support planning. Psychological assessments may be helpful for concerns related to mood and anxiety conditions, personality functioning, and other mental health concerns.

serviceList.title: Neuropsychological Evaluations
serviceList.description: Neuropsychological evaluations examine how brain functioning relates to thinking, memory, attention, language, and problem-solving abilities. These assessments are useful for understanding cognitive concerns related to neurological conditions, medical illness, learning differences, attention difficulties, or changes in cognitive functioning. The evaluation process includes a detailed clinical interview, specialized cognitive testing, and a comprehensive report with diagnostic impressions and personalized recommendations to support treatment, academic or workplace functioning, and daily life.

providers.name: Dr. Michelle Tan (she/her)
providers.title: Licensed Clinical Psychologist
providers.bio:
Licensed clinical psychologist providing therapy and comprehensive evaluations for children, adolescents, and adults. Her work focuses on the relationship between brain functioning, emotional wellbeing, and physical health. Her clinical interests include ADHD, autism spectrum disorder, learning disabilities, cognitive changes and neurodegenerative conditions, chronic illness adjustment, aging, and existential concerns.

Prior to starting her own practice, Dr. Tan held leadership and training roles in multidisciplinary clinical settings, where she specialized in psychological and neuropsychological assessment across the lifespan and supervised trainees in assessment and clinical care. She currently is also an Assistant Professor at the Illinois School of Professional Psychology, where she is involved in training and mentoring future psychologists.

providers.name: Dr. Adam Hiebel (he/him/his)
providers.title: Licensed Clinical Psychologist
providers.bio:
Licensed clinical psychologist who provides evidence-based psychotherapy and psychological assessment for adolescents and adults. He works with individuals seeking support for concerns such as anxiety, depression, stress, identity development, and life transitions.

Dr. Hiebel has a particular interest in supporting LGBTQ+ individuals and adolescents, offering an affirming therapeutic environment where clients can explore their experiences and strengthen resilience.

His treatment approach is grounded in cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), helping clients understand the connections between thoughts, emotions, and behaviors while developing practical strategies for meaningful change.

insurance.headline: Insurance & Billing
insurance.text:
We accept most major insurance plans and are happy to help you understand your benefits before beginning services. Because coverage can vary depending on your specific plan, we can provide a personalized estimate of expected costs based on your insurance information.

For individuals without insurance coverage or whose plans are out-of-network, we offer transparent self-pay rates and may provide sliding scale fees when appropriate. Sliding scale fees are adjusted based on financial circumstances in order to help make care more accessible.

If you have questions about coverage, fees, or payment options, we encourage you to reach out and we will be glad to assist you in understanding your options before scheduling services.
